features.title: 1500 Basic Words
features.description: Word ↔ Hindi matching & audio quizzes designed for Classes 5–8 students building their foundation.

features.title: 9 Quiz Formats
features.description: Synonyms, antonyms, fill-in-blanks, idioms, word analogy, cloze tests & more — never boring.

features.title: Competitive Ready
features.description: 5000 curated words mapped to SSC, UPSC, Banking, NEET & JEE question patterns.

testimonials.text: Cleared SSC CGL with 90% in English vocab. This app made practice actually fun — not like boring textbooks.
testimonials.name: Ravi Kumar

testimonials.text: My Class 8 students love the word-matching quizzes. Their vocabulary has doubled in just 2 months.
testimonials.name: Priya Sharma

testimonials.text: Perfect for UPSC preparation. The advanced word list covers everything that appears in GS Paper II.
testimonials.name: Anjali Mishra

testimonials.text: English became my strongest section in JEE Advanced after 3 months of daily practice with this app.
testimonials.name: Arjun Patel
